title: Better Snowball Fights
description: Allows snowballs do damage through a custom gamerule
body:
# Better Snowball Fights This Vanilla compatible mod allows snowballs (and other projectiles!) to do damage through a custom gamerule, making it possible to have actual snowball fights in Minecraft.

This mod can be installed on the client to be used in Single Player and Open to LAN worlds, or on a Fabric server. ## How to use this mod | Gamerule | Description | |------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------| | snowballDamage, eggDamage, fishingBobberDamage | Sets the damage when hit with the projectile | | snowballsOnlyDamagePlayers, eggsOnlyDamagePlayers, fishingBobbersOnlyDamagePlayers | Toggle the modded damage only when fighting players | | snowballKnockback, eggKnockback, fishingBobberKnockback | Increase the amount of knockback provided when hit with the projectile | | fishingPullMultiplier | Increase the pull strength of the fishing rod | **Only the host needs to have this mod installed, clients can join the fight without needing to install the mod.**

## Installation Instructions (Single Player Worlds) 1. Go to the [FabricMC website](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) and download the latest installer 2. Run the JAR, a window will pop up. Choose the correct version of Minecraft and loader, and click on "Install". 3. A new game version and profile will be created in the launcher's menu, which you can now use to launch Fabric. 4. Go to [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) or [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) and download Fabric API. 5. Place the Fabric API Jar and the Better Vanilla Snowballs Jar into your "mods" folder 6. Run the newly installed profile from step 3 ## Installation Instructions (Server) This mod works on both a dedicated server and in Single Player worlds.
To create a fabric server, please follow these instructions on [The Fabric Website](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/). ### License This mod is available under the MIT license.
